subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Youth to him who hath believed in God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, that he may be drawn by the words of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الغلام الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لتستجذبه کلمات الله
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @suffering and imprisonment
